specializations: Lipid-based drug and active delivery systems
Softgel and hard capsule lipid technologies
product_highlights: Capsugel® LICAPS™ — liquid-filled hard capsule technology for actives
Gelucire® — semi-solid lipid excipients for bioavailability enhancement
Compritol® — solid lipid excipient for sustained-release nanoparticle matrices
Lipoceré™ — lipid-based carrier system for poorly soluble cosmetic actives
notes: Lonza is a global leader in life sciences manufacturing, with its Capsugel division providing a comprehensive portfolio of lipid-based delivery excipients widely used for enhancing the bioavailability of poorly soluble active ingredients. Their Gelucire® and Compritol® lipid excipient series are industry-standard reference materials for constructing solid lipid nanoparticles (SLNs) and nanostructured lipid carriers (NLCs) in cosmetic formulations. Lonza's pharmaceutical-grade manufacturing standards and deep lipid chemistry expertise make them a high-credibility reference for SKIN-TWIN's delivery system library.
